title: Subtraction
summary: Subtraction describes removal, comparison, or difference between quantities.
claim: Subtraction describes the removal of a quantity from another quantity, or the difference between two quantities.

proof_layers.summary: Subtraction describes removal, comparison, or difference between quantities.
proof_layers.intuitive_explanation: Subtraction is inverse to addition within the same arithmetic context.
proof_layers.formal_or_structural_proof: Subtraction is inverse to addition within the same arithmetic context.
proof_layers.empirical_or_reconstruction_basis: Reconstructable with simple objects, marks, measurement, or geometric construction depending on the truth.
proof_layers.validation_assessment: Level 5 — Mathematical / Logical Proof within arithmetic.
